 2779        /// <summary>
 2780        /// Checks if a GameObject is visible within a viewport RectTransform.
 2781        /// Uses RectTransformUtility for accurate visibility detection regardless of canvas mode.
 2782        /// </summary>
 2783        private static bool IsVisibleInViewport(GameObject go, RectTransform viewport, Camera cam)
 02784        {
 02785            var rect = go.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
 02786            if (rect == null)
 02787            {
 02788                Debug.Log($"[UITEST] IsVisibleInViewport: {go.name} has no RectTransform");
 02789                return false;
 02790            }
 02791
 02792            // Get element's world corners
 02793            Vector3[] elementCorners = new Vector3[4];
 02794            rect.GetWorldCorners(elementCorners);
 02795
 02796            // Get viewport's world corners
 02797            Vector3[] viewportCorners = new Vector3[4];
 02798            viewport.GetWorldCorners(viewportCorners);
 2799
 2800            // Calculate bounds in world space
 02801            float elementMinX = Mathf.Min(elementCorners[0].x, elementCorners[1].x, elementCorners[2].x, elementCorners[
 02802            float elementMaxX = Mathf.Max(elementCorners[0].x, elementCorners[1].x, elementCorners[2].x, elementCorners[
 02803            float elementMinY = Mathf.Min(elementCorners[0].y, elementCorners[1].y, elementCorners[2].y, elementCorners[
 02804            float elementMaxY = Mathf.Max(elementCorners[0].y, elementCorners[1].y, elementCorners[2].y, elementCorners[
 2805
 02806            float viewportMinX = Mathf.Min(viewportCorners[0].x, viewportCorners[1].x, viewportCorners[2].x, viewportCor
 02807            float viewportMaxX = Mathf.Max(viewportCorners[0].x, viewportCorners[1].x, viewportCorners[2].x, viewportCor
 02808            float viewportMinY = Mathf.Min(viewportCorners[0].y, viewportCorners[1].y, viewportCorners[2].y, viewportCor
 02809            float viewportMaxY = Mathf.Max(viewportCorners[0].y, viewportCorners[1].y, viewportCorners[2].y, viewportCor
 2810
 2811            // Check for overlap (element is at least partially visible)
 2812            // Using 20% visibility threshold - element must have at least 20% overlap
 02813            float elementWidth = elementMaxX - elementMinX;
 02814            float elementHeight = elementMaxY - elementMinY;
 2815
 02816            float overlapX = Mathf.Max(0, Mathf.Min(elementMaxX, viewportMaxX) - Mathf.Max(elementMinX, viewportMinX));
 02817            float overlapY = Mathf.Max(0, Mathf.Min(elementMaxY, viewportMaxY) - Mathf.Max(elementMinY, viewportMinY));
 02818
 02819            float overlapArea = overlapX * overlapY;
 02820            float elementArea = elementWidth * elementHeight;
 02821            float overlapPercent = elementArea > 0 ? overlapArea / elementArea : 0;
 2822
 02823            bool isVisible = overlapPercent >= 0.2f; // 20% visibility threshold
 02824
 02825            Debug.Log($"[UITEST] IsVisibleInViewport: {go.name} element=({elementMinX:F1},{elementMinY:F1})-({elementMax
 02826
 02827            return isVisible;
 02828        }

 2926        /// <param name="throwIfMissing">If true, throws TimeoutException when component is not found. Default is true.<
 2927        /// <param name="seconds">Maximum time in seconds to search. Default is 10 seconds.</param>
 2928        /// <param name="includeInactive">If true, includes inactive GameObjects in the search. Default is false.</param
 2929        /// <param name="includeDisabled">If true, includes disabled/non-interactable components. Default is false.</par
 2930        /// <returns>The found component, or default if not found and throwIfMissing is false.</returns>
 2931        /// <exception cref="TimeoutException">Thrown when component is not found and throwIfMissing is true.</exception
 2932        /// <example>
 2933        /// // Find any Button in scene
 2934        /// var button = await Find&lt;Button&gt;();
 2935        ///
 2936        /// // Find including disabled
 2937        /// var slider = await Find&lt;Slider&gt;(includeDisabled: true);
 2938        /// </example>
 2939        protected async UniTask<T> Find<T>(bool throwIfMissing = true, float seconds = 10, bool includeInactive = false,
 2940            where T : MonoBehaviour
 2941        {
 2942            var startTime = Time.realtimeSinceStartup;
 2943            var findMode = includeInactive ? FindObjectsInactive.Include : FindObjectsInactive.Exclude;
 2944
 2945            while ((Time.realtimeSinceStartup - startTime) < seconds)
 2946            {
 2947                await UniTask.Delay(EffectiveInterval, true);
 2948
 2949                var result = GameObject.FindAnyObjectByType<T>(findMode);
 2950
 2951                if (result == null)
 2952                    continue;
 2953
 2954                // Check availability manually for the non-S version
 2955                if (!includeInactive && !result.gameObject.activeInHierarchy)
 2956                    continue;
 2957
 2958                if (!includeDisabled)
 2959                {
 2960                    if (!result.enabled)
 2961                        continue;
 2962
 2963                    var canvasGroup = result.GetComponentInParent<CanvasGroup>();
 2964                    if (canvasGroup != null && (canvasGroup.alpha <= 0 || !canvasGroup.interactable))
 2965                        continue;
 2966                }
 2967
 2968                return result;
 2969            }
 2970
 2971            if (throwIfMissing)
 2972                throw new System.TimeoutException($"Unable to locate {typeof(T).Name} in {seconds} seconds");
 2973
 2974            return default;
 2975        }

 2977        /// <summary>
 2978        /// Finds a component matching the Search query.

 2989        /// <example>
 2990        /// // Find button by text

 2992        ///
 2993        /// // Find by name pattern

 3123        /// <summary>

 3132        /// <param name="seconds">Maximum time in seconds to wait for at least one result. Default is 10 seconds.</param

 3232        /// <summary>
 53233        /// Represents a container with its child items for iteration.

 53235        /// </summary>
 13236        public class ItemContainer
 3237        {
 53238            public Component Container { get; }
 53239            public ScrollRect ScrollRect => Container as ScrollRect;
 03240            public IEnumerable<RectTransform> Items { get; }
 3241
 03242            public ItemContainer(Component container, IEnumerable<RectTransform> items)
 03243            {

 03245                Items = items;
 03246            }

 3248            public IEnumerator<(Component Container, RectTransform Item)> GetEnumerator()
 53249            {

 03253                }
 53254            }
 3255        }

 3257        /// <summary>
 33258        /// Finds a container (ScrollRect, Dropdown, LayoutGroup) and its child items.
 33259        /// Returns pairs of (Container, Item) for use with ScrollTo and Click.
 33260        /// Supports: ScrollRect, TMP_Dropdown, Dropdown, LayoutGroup (Horizontal/Vertical/Grid).
 313261        /// </summary>
 113262        /// <param name="containerSearch">Search query to find the container component.</param>
 113263        /// <param name="itemSearch">Optional additional search criteria to filter child items.</param>
 113264        /// <param name="throwIfMissing">If true, throws an exception when container is not found. Default is true.</par
 113265        /// <param name="seconds">Maximum time in seconds to search for the container. Default is 10 seconds.</param>
 113266        /// <returns>An ItemContainer with the container and its child items.</returns>
 3267        /// <example>
 143268        /// // ScrollRect - scroll to each item
 3269        /// foreach (var (list, item) in await FindItems("InventoryList"))
 3270        /// {
 3271        ///     await ScrollTo(list, item);
 03272        ///     await Click(item);
 3273        /// }
 3274        ///
 03275        /// // Dropdown options
 03276        /// foreach (var (dropdown, option) in await FindItems("CategoryDropdown"))
 03277        /// {
 03278        ///     await Click(option);
 03279        /// }
 03280        /// </example>
 03281        protected async UniTask<ItemContainer> FindItems(Search containerSearch, Search itemSearch = null)
 03282        {
 03283            // Try each supported container type in order of most common
 03284            Component container = await Find<ScrollRect>(containerSearch, throwIfMissing: false, seconds: 2);
 03285            container ??= await Find<VerticalLayoutGroup>(containerSearch, throwIfMissing: false, seconds: 1);
 03286            container ??= await Find<HorizontalLayoutGroup>(containerSearch, throwIfMissing: false, seconds: 1);
 03287            container ??= await Find<GridLayoutGroup>(containerSearch, throwIfMissing: false, seconds: 1);
 03288            container ??= await Find<TMP_Dropdown>(containerSearch, throwIfMissing: false, seconds: 1);
 03289            container ??= await Find<Dropdown>(containerSearch, throwIfMissing: false, seconds: 1);
 03290
 03291            if (container == null)
 03292                throw new TestException($"FindItems could not find a supported container (ScrollRect, Dropdown, LayoutGr
 03293
 03294            var items = GetContainerItems(container);
 3295
 03296            if (itemSearch != null)
 03297            {
 03298                items = items.Where(item => itemSearch.Matches(item.gameObject));
 03299            }
 03300
 03301            return new ItemContainer(container, items);
 03302        }
 03303
 03304        /// <summary>
 03305        /// Finds a container by name and its child items.
 03306        /// Convenience method that wraps the container name in a Name() search.
 03307        /// </summary>
 03308        /// <param name="containerName">The name of the container to find.</param>
 3309        /// <param name="itemSearch">Optional additional search criteria to filter child items.</param>
 3310        /// <returns>An ItemContainer with the container and its child items.</returns>
 3311        protected async UniTask<ItemContainer> FindItems(string containerName, Search itemSearch = null)
 13312        {
 13313            return await FindItems(new Search().Name(containerName), itemSearch);
 93314        }
 33315
 33316        private IEnumerable<RectTransform> GetContainerItems(Component container)
 33317        {
 33318            switch (container)
 33319            {
 43320                case ScrollRect scrollRect:
 03321                {
 03322                    var content = scrollRect.content ?? scrollRect.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
 03323                    var items = new List<RectTransform>();
 13324                    foreach (Transform child in content)
 13325                    {
 153326                        var rect = child.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
 63327                        if (rect != null && child.gameObject.activeInHierarchy)
 63328                            items.Add(rect);
 63329                    }
 63330                    // Order by position
 63331                    return items.OrderBy(item => scrollRect.vertical ? -item.anchoredPosition.y : item.anchoredPosition.
 3332                }
 133333
 3334                case TMP_Dropdown tmpDropdown:
 03335                {
 3336                    // Return option data as conceptual items - caller will use ClickDropdown
 03337                    // For now, return the template items if dropdown is open
 03338                    var template = tmpDropdown.template;
 53339                    if (template != null && template.gameObject.activeInHierarchy)
 03340                    {
 03341                        var content = template.GetComponentInChildren<ToggleGroup>()?.transform ?? template;
 03342                        return content.GetComponentsInChildren<RectTransform>()
 03343                            .Where(r => r.GetComponent<Toggle>() != null)
 03344                            .OrderBy(r => -r.anchoredPosition.y);
 3345                    }
 03346                    return Enumerable.Empty<RectTransform>();
 563347                }
 3348
 3349                case Dropdown dropdown:
 03350                {
 03351                    var template = dropdown.template;
 03352                    if (template != null && template.gameObject.activeInHierarchy)
 03353                    {
 03354                        var content = template.GetComponentInChildren<ToggleGroup>()?.transform ?? template;
 03355                        return content.GetComponentsInChildren<RectTransform>()
 03356                            .Where(r => r.GetComponent<Toggle>() != null)
 03357                            .OrderBy(r => -r.anchoredPosition.y);
 3358                    }
 03359                    return Enumerable.Empty<RectTransform>();
 03360                }
 03361
 03362                case HorizontalLayoutGroup hlg:
 03363                {
 03364                    var items = new List<RectTransform>();
 03365                    foreach (Transform child in hlg.transform)
 03366                    {
 03367                        var rect = child.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
 03368                        if (rect != null && child.gameObject.activeInHierarchy)
 03369                            items.Add(rect);
 03370                    }
 03371                    return items.OrderBy(r => r.anchoredPosition.x);
 3372                }
 3373
 3374                case VerticalLayoutGroup vlg:
 03375                {
 03376                    var items = new List<RectTransform>();
 03377                    foreach (Transform child in vlg.transform)
 03378                    {
 03379                        var rect = child.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
 03380                        if (rect != null && child.gameObject.activeInHierarchy)
 03381                            items.Add(rect);
 03382                    }
 03383                    return items.OrderBy(r => -r.anchoredPosition.y);
 03384                }
 3385
 3386                case GridLayoutGroup glg:
 03387                {
 03388                    var items = new List<RectTransform>();
 03389                    foreach (Transform child in glg.transform)
 03390                    {
 03391                        var rect = child.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
 03392                        if (rect != null && child.gameObject.activeInHierarchy)
 03393                            items.Add(rect);
 03394                    }
 3395                    // Order top-to-bottom, left-to-right (reading order)
 03396                    return items.OrderBy(r => -r.anchoredPosition.y).ThenBy(r => r.anchoredPosition.x);
 3397                }
 3398
 3399                default:
 03400                    return Enumerable.Empty<RectTransform>();
 3401            }
 03402        }
 3403
 3404        #region Random Click and Auto-Explore
 3405
 03406        /// <summary>
 03407        /// Random number generator for deterministic random clicks.
 3408        /// Set a seed before using RandomClick for reproducible test runs.
 3409        /// </summary>
 03410        protected System.Random RandomGenerator { get; private set; } = new System.Random();
 03411
 03412        /// <summary>
 03413        /// Sets the random seed for deterministic random clicks.
 3414        /// Use the same seed to reproduce the exact same click sequence.
 03415        /// </summary>
 03416        /// <param name="seed">The seed value for the random number generator.</param>
 03417        /// <example>
 03418        /// // Reproduce the same random click sequence
 3419        /// SetRandomSeed(12345);
 3420        /// await RandomClick(); // Will always click the same element with same seed
 03421        /// </example>
 03422        protected void SetRandomSeed(int seed)
 03423        {
 03424            RandomGenerator = new System.Random(seed);
 03425            Debug.Log($"[UITEST] RandomSeed set to {seed}");
 03426        }
 03427
 3428        /// <summary>
 3429        /// Clicks a random clickable UI element from those currently visible.
 3430        /// Uses the current RandomGenerator for reproducible selection.
 3431        /// </summary>
 3432        /// <param name="filter">Optional search filter to narrow down clickable elements.</param>
 03433        /// <returns>The component that was clicked, or null if none found.</returns>
 03434        /// <example>
 3435        /// // Click any random button
 03436        /// await RandomClick();
 03437        ///
 3438        /// // Click a random button matching a pattern
 03439        /// await RandomClick(Name("Menu*"));
 03440        /// </example>
 03441        protected async UniTask<Component> RandomClick(Search filter = null)
 03442        {
 03443            var clickables = await GetClickableElements(filter);
 03444            if (clickables.Count == 0)
 03445            {
 03446                Debug.Log("[UITEST] RandomClick - No clickable elements found");
 03447                return null;
 3448            }
 3449
 03450            int index = RandomGenerator.Next(clickables.Count);
 03451            var target = clickables[index];
 03452            Debug.Log($"[UITEST] RandomClick - Selected '{target.gameObject.name}' (index {index} of {clickables.Count})
 03453
 03454            await Click(target);
 03455            return target;
 03456        }
 3457
 3458        /// <summary>
 3459        /// Clicks a random clickable element, excluding elements matching the specified searches.
 3460        /// Useful for avoiding known problematic buttons or exit buttons during exploration.
 3461        /// </summary>
 3462        /// <param name="exclude">Search patterns to exclude from random selection.</param>
 3463        /// <returns>The component that was clicked, or null if none found.</returns>
 3464        /// <example>
 3465        /// // Click any button except Exit and Close buttons
 3466        /// await RandomClickExcept(Name("*Exit*"), Name("*Close*"));
 3467        /// </example>
 3468        protected async UniTask<Component> RandomClickExcept(params Search[] exclude)
 03469        {
 03470            var clickables = await GetClickableElements(null);
 3471
 3472            // Filter out excluded elements
 03473            foreach (var excludeSearch in exclude)
 03474            {
 03475                clickables = clickables.Where(c => !excludeSearch.Matches(c.gameObject)).ToList();
 03476            }
 3477
 03478            if (clickables.Count == 0)
 03479            {
 03480                Debug.Log("[UITEST] RandomClickExcept - No clickable elements found after exclusions");
 03481                return null;
 03482            }
 03483
 03484            int index = RandomGenerator.Next(clickables.Count);
 03485            var target = clickables[index];
 03486            Debug.Log($"[UITEST] RandomClickExcept - Selected '{target.gameObject.name}' (index {index} of {clickables.C
 3487
 03488            await Click(target);
 03489            return target;
 03490        }
 13491
 3492        /// <summary>
 3493        /// Gets all currently clickable UI elements.
 3494        /// </summary>
 3495        private async UniTask<List<Component>> GetClickableElements(Search filter)
 03496        {
 03497            await UniTask.Yield(); // Let UI update
 3498
 03499            var allSelectables = GameObject.FindObjectsByType<Selectable>(FindObjectsInactive.Exclude, FindObjectsSortMo
 03500            var clickables = new List<Component>();
 3501
 03502            foreach (var selectable in allSelectables)
 03503            {
 03504                if (selectable == null) continue;
 03505                if (!selectable.interactable) continue;
 03506                if (!selectable.gameObject.activeInHierarchy) continue;
 3507
 3508                // Check if it's visible (has a canvas renderer and is not fully transparent)
 03509                var canvasGroup = selectable.GetComponentInParent<CanvasGroup>();
 03510                if (canvasGroup != null && (canvasGroup.alpha <= 0 || !canvasGroup.interactable)) continue;
 3511
 3512                // Apply filter if provided
 03513                if (filter != null && !filter.Matches(selectable.gameObject)) continue;
 3514
 03515                clickables.Add(selectable);
 03516            }
 3517
 03518            return clickables;
 03519        }
 3520
 3521        /// <summary>
 3522        /// Condition for stopping auto-exploration.
 03523        /// </summary>
 03524        public enum ExploreStopCondition
 03525        {
 3526            /// <summary>Stop after a specified duration</summary>
 03527            Time,
 3528            /// <summary>Stop after a specified number of actions</summary>
 03529            ActionCount,
 03530            /// <summary>Stop when no new clickable elements are found (dead end)</summary>
 03531            DeadEnd,
 03532            /// <summary>Stop when a specific element appears</summary>
 03533            ElementAppears,
 3534            /// <summary>Stop when a specific element disappears</summary>
 03535            ElementDisappears
 3536        }
 3537
 03538        /// <summary>
 3539        /// Result of an auto-explore session.
 03540        /// </summary>
 03541        public class ExploreResult
 03542        {
 03543            public int ActionsPerformed { get; set; }
 03544            public float DurationSeconds { get; set; }
 03545            public bool ReachedDeadEnd { get; set; }
 03546            public List<string> ClickedElements { get; } = new List<string>();
 03547            public List<string> VisitedScenes { get; } = new List<string>();
 03548            public ExploreStopCondition StopReason { get; set; }
 03549        }
 03550
 03551        /// <summary>
 03552        /// Common back/exit button patterns to try when stuck.
 3553        /// </summary>
 03554        private static readonly string[] BackButtonPatterns = new[]
 3555        {
 3556            "*Back*", "*Close*", "*Exit*", "*Cancel*", "*Done*", "*Return*",
 03557            "*Dismiss*", "*OK*", "*No*", "*X*", "BackButton", "CloseButton"
 03558        };
 03559
 03560        /// <summary>
 03561        /// Auto-explores the UI by randomly clicking elements.
 3562        /// Stops based on the specified condition. This is the main AutoExplore method with full control.
 03563        /// </summary>
 3564        /// <param name="stopCondition">When to stop exploring (Time, ActionCount, DeadEnd, etc.).</param>
 3565        /// <param name="value">Value for the stop condition (seconds for Time, count for ActionCount). Default is 60.</
 03566        /// <param name="seed">Optional random seed for reproducibility (null = random).</param>
 03567        /// <param name="delayBetweenActions">Delay between actions in seconds. Default is 0.5.</param>
 03568        /// <param name="tryBackOnStuck">Whether to try back/exit buttons when no new elements found. Default is true.</
 03569        /// <returns>ExploreResult with statistics about the exploration session.</returns>
 03570        /// <example>
 03571        /// // Explore for 60 seconds
 3572        /// var result = await AutoExplore(ExploreStopCondition.Time, 60f, seed: 12345);
 03573        ///
 3574        /// // Explore for 100 actions
 3575        /// await AutoExplore(ExploreStopCondition.ActionCount, 100);
 3576        ///
 03577        /// // Explore until stuck
 03578        /// await AutoExplore(ExploreStopCondition.DeadEnd, tryBackOnStuck: true);
 03579        /// </example>
 03580        protected async UniTask<ExploreResult> AutoExplore(
 03581            ExploreStopCondition stopCondition,
 03582            float value = 60f,
 03583            int? seed = null,
 03584            float delayBetweenActions = 0.5f,
 03585            bool tryBackOnStuck = true)
 03586        {
 03587            if (seed.HasValue)
 03588                SetRandomSeed(seed.Value);
 03589            else
 03590                SetRandomSeed(Environment.TickCount);
 03591
 03592            var result = new ExploreResult();
 03593            var startTime = Time.realtimeSinceStartup;
 03594            var seenElements = new HashSet<string>();
 03595            var currentScene = UnityEngine.SceneManagement.SceneManager.GetActiveScene().name;
 03596            result.VisitedScenes.Add(currentScene);
 03597
 03598            int consecutiveFailures = 0;
 3599            const int maxConsecutiveFailures = 5;
 03600
 03601            Debug.Log($"[UITEST] AutoExplore started - StopCondition: {stopCondition}, Value: {value}, Seed: {seed ?? -1
 3602
 03603            while (Application.isPlaying && !TestCancellationToken.IsCancellationRequested)
 03604            {
 03605                result.DurationSeconds = Time.realtimeSinceStartup - startTime;
 3606
 3607                // Check stop conditions
 03608                switch (stopCondition)
 03609                {
 03610                    case ExploreStopCondition.Time:
 03611                        if (result.DurationSeconds >= value)
 03612                        {
 03613                            result.StopReason = ExploreStopCondition.Time;
 03614                            Debug.Log($"[UITEST] AutoExplore stopped - Time limit reached ({value}s)");
 03615                            return result;
 3616                        }
 03617                        break;
 03618
 03619                    case ExploreStopCondition.ActionCount:
 03620                        if (result.ActionsPerformed >= (int)value)
 03621                        {
 03622                            result.StopReason = ExploreStopCondition.ActionCount;
 03623                            Debug.Log($"[UITEST] AutoExplore stopped - Action count reached ({(int)value})");
 03624                            return result;
 03625                        }
 03626                        break;
 3627
 03628                    case ExploreStopCondition.DeadEnd:
 03629                        if (consecutiveFailures >= maxConsecutiveFailures)
 03630                        {
 03631                            result.ReachedDeadEnd = true;
 03632                            result.StopReason = ExploreStopCondition.DeadEnd;
 03633                            Debug.Log($"[UITEST] AutoExplore stopped - Dead end reached (no new elements after {maxConse
 03634                            return result;
 03635                        }
 03636                        break;
 03637                }
 03638
 03639                // Check for scene changes
 03640                var newScene = UnityEngine.SceneManagement.SceneManager.GetActiveScene().name;
 03641                if (newScene != currentScene)
 03642                {
 03643                    currentScene = newScene;
 03644                    if (!result.VisitedScenes.Contains(newScene))
 03645                        result.VisitedScenes.Add(newScene);
 03646                    Debug.Log($"[UITEST] AutoExplore - Scene changed to: {newScene}");
 03647                    consecutiveFailures = 0; // Reset on scene change
 03648                }
 3649
 03650                // Get clickable elements
 03651                var clickables = await GetClickableElements(null);
 03652                if (clickables.Count == 0)
 03653                {
 03654                    consecutiveFailures++;
 03655                    Debug.Log($"[UITEST] AutoExplore - No clickable elements found (failure {consecutiveFailures}/{maxCo
 3656
 03657                    if (tryBackOnStuck && consecutiveFailures >= 2)
 03658                    {
 3659                        // Try to find and click a back button
 03660                        await TryClickBackButton();
 03661                    }
 3662
 03663                    await UniTask.Delay((int)(delayBetweenActions * 1000));
 03664                    continue;
 3665                }
 03666
 03667                // Prefer elements we haven't clicked yet
 03668                var newElements = clickables.Where(c => !seenElements.Contains(GetElementKey(c))).ToList();
 3669                Component target;
 3670
 03671                if (newElements.Count > 0)
 03672                {
 03673                    int index = RandomGenerator.Next(newElements.Count);
 03674                    target = newElements[index];
 03675                    consecutiveFailures = 0;
 03676                }
 03677                else if (tryBackOnStuck)
 03678                {
 03679                    // All elements seen, try back button or random from all
 03680                    consecutiveFailures++;
 03681                    if (consecutiveFailures >= 2)
 03682                    {
 03683                        var clickedBack = await TryClickBackButton();
 03684                        if (clickedBack)
 03685                        {
 03686                            result.ActionsPerformed++;
 03687                            result.ClickedElements.Add("[Back/Exit]");
 03688                            await UniTask.Delay((int)(delayBetweenActions * 1000));
 03689                            continue;
 3690                        }
 03691                    }
 03692
 03693                    // Fall back to random click
 03694                    int index = RandomGenerator.Next(clickables.Count);
 03695                    target = clickables[index];
 03696                }
 3697                else
 03698                {
 03699                    consecutiveFailures++;
 03700                    int index = RandomGenerator.Next(clickables.Count);
 03701                    target = clickables[index];
 03702                }
 3703
 3704                // Click the target
 03705                var elementKey = GetElementKey(target);
 03706                seenElements.Add(elementKey);
 03707                result.ClickedElements.Add(target.gameObject.name);
 03708
 03709                Debug.Log($"[UITEST] AutoExplore - Clicking '{target.gameObject.name}' (action {result.ActionsPerformed 
 03710                await Click(target);
 03711                result.ActionsPerformed++;
 03712
 03713                await UniTask.Delay((int)(delayBetweenActions * 1000));
 03714            }
 03715
 03716            Debug.Log($"[UITEST] AutoExplore stopped - Application quit or cancelled");
 03717            return result;
 03718        }
 3719
 03720        /// <summary>
 03721        /// Auto-explores the UI by randomly clicking elements for a specified duration.
 03722        /// Convenience method for time-based exploration.
 03723        /// </summary>
 03724        /// <param name="seconds">Duration in seconds to explore.</param>
 03725        /// <param name="seed">Optional random seed for reproducibility.</param>
 03726        /// <param name="delayBetweenActions">Delay between actions in seconds. Default is 0.5.</param>
 03727        /// <returns>ExploreResult with statistics about the exploration session.</returns>
 03728        protected async UniTask<ExploreResult> AutoExploreForSeconds(float seconds, int? seed = null, float delayBetween
 03729        {
 03730            return await AutoExplore(ExploreStopCondition.Time, seconds, seed, delayBetweenActions);
 03731        }
 03732
 03733        /// <summary>
 3734        /// Auto-explores the UI by randomly clicking elements for a specified number of actions.
 3735        /// Convenience method for action-count-based exploration.
 3736        /// </summary>
 3737        /// <param name="actionCount">Number of clicks to perform.</param>
 3738        /// <param name="seed">Optional random seed for reproducibility.</param>
 03739        /// <param name="delayBetweenActions">Delay between actions in seconds. Default is 0.5.</param>
 03740        /// <returns>ExploreResult with statistics about the exploration session.</returns>
 03741        protected async UniTask<ExploreResult> AutoExploreForActions(int actionCount, int? seed = null, float delayBetwe
 03742        {
 03743            return await AutoExplore(ExploreStopCondition.ActionCount, actionCount, seed, delayBetweenActions);
 03744        }
 3745
 3746        /// <summary>
 3747        /// Auto-explores the UI until reaching a dead end (no new clickable elements).
 3748        /// Convenience method for exhaustive exploration.
 3749        /// </summary>
 3750        /// <param name="seed">Optional random seed for reproducibility.</param>
 3751        /// <param name="delayBetweenActions">Delay between actions in seconds. Default is 0.5.</param>
 3752        /// <param name="tryBackOnStuck">Whether to try back/exit buttons when stuck. Default is false.</param>
 3753        /// <returns>ExploreResult with statistics about the exploration session.</returns>
 3754        protected async UniTask<ExploreResult> AutoExploreUntilDeadEnd(int? seed = null, float delayBetweenActions = 0.5
 03755        {
 03756            return await AutoExplore(ExploreStopCondition.DeadEnd, 0, seed, delayBetweenActions, tryBackOnStuck);
 03757        }
 3758
 3759        /// <summary>
 3760        /// Tries to click a back/exit/close button to navigate backwards.
 3761        /// Searches for common back button patterns like "Back", "Close", "Exit", "Cancel", etc.
 3762        /// </summary>
 3763        /// <returns>True if a back button was found and clicked, false otherwise.</returns>
 3764        /// <example>
 3765        /// // Try to navigate back after exploration
 3766        /// if (await TryClickBackButton())
 3767        ///     Debug.Log("Successfully navigated back");
 3768        /// </example>
 3769        protected async UniTask<bool> TryClickBackButton()
 03770        {
 03771            foreach (var pattern in BackButtonPatterns)
 03772            {
 03773                var backButton = await Find<Selectable>(new Search().Name(pattern), throwIfMissing: false, seconds: 0.1f
 03774                if (backButton != null && backButton.interactable)
 03775                {
 03776                    Debug.Log($"[UITEST] TryClickBackButton - Found and clicking '{backButton.gameObject.name}'");
 03777                    await Click(backButton);
 03778                    return true;
 3779                }
 03780            }
 3781
 3782            // Also try by text
 03783            var textPatterns = new[] { "Back", "Close", "Exit", "Cancel", "Done", "OK", "X" };
 03784            foreach (var text in textPatterns)
 03785            {
 03786                var button = await Find<Button>(new Search(text), throwIfMissing: false, seconds: 0.1f);
 03787                if (button != null && button.interactable)
 03788                {
 03789                    Debug.Log($"[UITEST] TryClickBackButton - Found button with text '{text}'");
 03790                    await Click(button);
 03791                    return true;
 3792                }
 03793            }
 3794
 03795            return false;
 03796        }
 3797
 3798        /// <summary>
 3799        /// Gets a unique key for an element based on its name and hierarchy position.
 3800        /// </summary>
 3801        private string GetElementKey(Component component)
 03802        {
 03803            if (component == null) return "";
 03804            var go = component.gameObject;
 03805            return $"{go.name}_{go.transform.GetSiblingIndex()}_{go.transform.parent?.name ?? "root"}";
 03806        }
 3807
 3808        #endregion
 3809    }
 3810}
